relationships.tomasz-seo-yun: Both knew. Both silent. One signed, one dropped her badge in the grass.
relationships.kwame: The witness. Hands flat on the console.
relationships.nadia: Perfect work feeding a failing system.

events: T1: Tomasz arrives. Badge A.
T2: Seo-yun arrives. Badge C.
T3: Verification ritual. Canteen intro.
T4: Seo-yun discovers 0.3% shift. 150 vs 340 GPa.
T5: Tomasz alone with seal. Tactile fog.
T6: First conversation. Canteen warmth.
T7: Paradox atmosphere. Kwame notes RF signal.
T8: Diamond cracks at 310. One diamond left.
T9: Last diamond. Stops at 317. Deviation 0.95%. Report: 'conforme dans la plage testée.'
T10: Seo-yun reads report, understands omission. Email to Yara at 2h17 AM.
T11: Meeting -- Yara's POV. Two columns. Lot 17-C conforme.
T12: Nadia portrait. Sequencing solution.
T13: Confrontation. 'Je ne sais plus.' Long silence. 'Mes mains—' unfinished. 'Le rapport est signé.'
T14: Centre fills. Compte-rendu has no errors. That's the problem.
T15: Phone calls. Tomasz: Zosia's wolf. Seo-yun: truths that don't frighten.
T16: La veille. Tomasz in verification room. Doesn't touch the cells. Hands at his sides.
T17: Activation. Nominal. Then the shift. Sector 7.
T18: Cascade. Nadia fights. Each correction creates a new problem.
T19: Seo-yun sees sector 7, lot 17-C. Recognition. Floor trembles. Neon goes out.
T20: Tomasz against the wall. Hands hidden. Perfectly still. He knows.
T21: Seo-yun outside. Badge C in the wet grass. The goats. The mountains.
player_choices: T6: Option B -- tablet first, badge at exit
T9: Option A -- show the gesture on the dial
T11: Yara's POV for the meeting
T15: Option A -- Tomasz's call in full
